data.title: GoPro wins 3rd Emmy® Award for 360 tech at 76th Annual Technology and Engineering Emmy® Awards.
data.description: Today, GoPro revealed that they have been honored with their third Emmy® Award for their outstanding innovation in 360 hardware and software. This prestigious recognition was received at the 76th Annual Technology and Engineering Emmy® Awards in San Mateo, California on September 18, 2025. The company's achievement highlights its dedication to pushing boundaries and setting new standards in the industry. This acknowledgment further solidifies GoPro's position as a leader, particularly in the realm of capturing immersive and high-quality content.

data.title: RuggON showcases advanced rugged solutions for mining at AIMEX 2025 to enhance safety and efficiency. Based in ADELAIDE, Australia.
data.description: RuggON, a subsidiary of Ubiqconn Technology, is enabling mining operators to excel in challenging conditions with advanced technologies. Through AI-powered driver safety, real-time fleet diagnostics, and constant connectivity via SATCOM, RuggON is revolutionizing the industry. The company's efforts are based out of ADELAIDE, Australia, and this initiative was announced on September 18, 2025, showcasing their dedication to enhancing operational efficiency and safety in mining activities.

data.title: Legal counsel for IEHP, Winston Y. Chan, responds to lawsuit by US Department of Justice filed on Sept. 17, 2025.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Winston Y. Chan from Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher, LLP, representing Inland Empire Health Plan (IEHP), addressed the recent legal action by the United States Department of Justice in Rancho Cucamonga, California. The statement comes following a lawsuit filed on September 17, 2025, by the Department of Justice.
